Off Calendar Dec-20-2001 Continued To Mar-04-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

MOTION Ntc Of Motion To Vacate Previously Imposed Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Vacate Previously Imposed Sanctions issued on 6/19/01 to Richard J. Staskus, Esq. in the amount of $200.00, is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection the tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving Party to Submit a Proposed Order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Araujo. (212)
